description: CompositionPink and blue round neck printed kurta, made of 100% cotton, has a split neckline, a mock placket, short sleeves and a vented hemFitRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry inside out in shadeWarm ironfolklore's latest line of kurtas considers the Spring '12 trend of batik and tribal designs and incorporates this new trend, fresh off the runways into their kurtas. Those interested in colour blocking can wear this with bright contrasting capris or pants. Others who want to keep their look classic and chic can pair this with tonal leggings, and embellished slippers.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
